reviews.review_text:
Accomodation was what I expected . Vacuum under the bed and the previous persons left over chicken in the bin could have been removed ..
If check out is 10 am , maybe the cleaners shouldn’t arrive at 9 am , and she was ever so lovely yelling they are still here . Upon telling her my paper work said 10 am check out and I wouldn’t be long as I was packing the car , I got grunted at  ..
check in was an experience , as my keys were in a lock box I hadn’t been told about or given a code .
Getting asked why I was there should of tipped me off

We were very appreciative of securing a site for us and our 3 Westies.  We were initially given a drive through with intent to move to another the next day but were happy for us to stay put as we were content with the site we were given. .

I stayed at the holiday park while working, I loved staying there,the park is clean and tidy,the guests surrounding were respectful and the staff are lovely but my favouritething was waking up and seeing the beautiful horses in the green fields...a particular thank you to Janine for making me feel so welcome...

Best caravan park|In Sydney staff kind caring helpful even the pods were quite spacious and had everything you needed in them decently priced had really|Good time there felt welcomed this had been my second stay there and I do plan on staying again
Great place to camp, good vibes. No nosey or noisy other visitors, 10/10

Grate place friendly accomodating I was in bad spot helped me instantly the worker pods have really good aircon and surprisingly comfortable really recommend staying hear this is new I forgot to say the staff are amazing such good helpful people
Great place to rest, has everything. Close to shops
Great setting walking distance to town. Good sites Clesn facilities when I Used them.

For us visiting our family close by it was perfect. There was a slight hiccup at the start with people on incorrect sites but the management/ owner sorted it very quickly. We had a drive through site with heaps of room not to far from the shower complex which were also clean
Stayed here, in our van at one of the powered sites down the back. Couldn’t fault it. Closest van park to Sydney that we could find. Gkk lm ad we did.

We had a good experience overall. The staff were very helpful and made things easier, which we really appreciated. The toilets were clean, and the powered grass camping area had a beautiful open view of the greenery, which made the setting feel very relaxing.
One downside was that the campsite is quite close to the main road, and the traffic noise was quite disturbing during the night. When you go camping, you naturally expect some peace and quiet, so that part was a little disappointing.

We stayed here with a group of ten all with caravans or hybrids. The site was fine. The spot allocated to us was a little tight. The staff were helpful. One issue is that when one toilet block is closed for cleaning the other one is quite some way away. There was a staffing shortage and so the front desk was not manned a lot of the time.
The cabin is tidy and is good for two, you can cook with all the appliances, utensils and kitchenware provided 👍
Good location near Camden good powered van sites clean hot showers and clean toilets friendly easy check in

This place is a hole. Huge big garbage skips with lids open practically next to the cabin I stayed in. Front door missing a lock. Loud disrespectful permanent residents. The toilet in the cabin was filthy. The bench-top (portable) stove was old, dirty and worn. Bed was comfortable.

A nice park, close to Camden and Narellan.
I had a grass site that was large, but had a number of wheel ruts which was a trip hazard.
Roadways were narrow made manoeuvre van difficult.
Update
1st revist
started on the lower grass are but had to relocate to the  upper area due to predicted flood, staff were amazing and very helpful.
2nd revisit,
Was called Poplar Caravan Park, now a  Hampshire park.
On upper level this time, good sized site, had to extend stay staff handled it without hassles.

Unfortunately, the experience was disappointing and did not justify the cost. There are several areas that require improvement. Despite the high cost per night (AUD 180 per night), housekeeping services were minimal (with linen and towels provided only once a week and no cleaning of the cabin). This level of service is unacceptable for accommodation priced comparably to hotels or motels, where regular housekeeping is standard. The cabin was not clean and had an unpleasant odour. Dust was evident throughout the cabin, and the sofa was also unclean. Although staff were helpful and changed the cabin, the replacement was also below an acceptable standard. Moreover, the area was overcrowded, which further detracted from the overall experience.

Unfortunately, the experience was disappointing and did not justify the cost. There are several areas that require improvement. Despite the high cost per night, housekeeping services were minimal (with linen and towels provided only once a week and no cleaning of the cabin). The cabin was not clean and had an unpleasant odour. Dust was evident throughout the cabin, and the sofa was also unclean. Moreover, the area was overcrowded, which further detracted from the overall experience.

I am very disappointed with the service at this campsite.

I was charged twice for the same night. I reported the issue to the staff on the day of my departure and was told that the extra payment would be refunded within 14 days. Unfortunately, the refund was never processed.

What makes the situation even worse is that the campsite has not responding to my emails requesting the refund.

This experience was very frustrating, and I do not recommend this campsite due to poor customer service and lack of communication.
We stopped overnight with our van. Great place. Would like to stay longer next time to explore the area. Staff were friendly and park was very clean.
Nice and easy to find, detailed email with gate codes. Few permanent dwellers. And next to a busy noisy road. But couldn't really complain for a dog friendly camp-site.

Unfortunately, this accommodation was not very kid friendly. The space felt very small and cramped for two adults and two young children.

I have a 6 month old baby and needed to use the kettle to boil water for bottles. When I took the kettle out of the cupboard, there was leftover water inside with an unpleasant smell, and the outside was dirty with food and sticky residue. It didn’t feel hygienic to use, so we ended up purchasing bottled water instead.

The toaster still contained crumbs, and the bathroom floor had hair throughout. There was no broom or vacuum provided to clean up. The property overall was very dusty, with visible dust on most surfaces, and the walls were extremely dirty.

The place would definitely benefit from a thorough deep clean, including all kitchen appliances.

Very comfortable cabin with all the necessities for a stay. Great deli/ fruit & veg market across from the main entrance plus a coffee and food van, petting goats and ponies. Walking distance to Camden Shopping Centre which has a great array of cafes and bakeries plus the lovely atmosphere. Will definitely return.

Only caravan park within the Macarthur region so no competition. Expensive for just a “parking area”. Has NO POOL, NO PLAY AREA for children. Amenities are dated & not very well maintained. Managers dogs constantly bark. HAD MAJOR ELECTRICAL ISSUES which they would not compensate us for. There were 9 caravans that had issues. Had to replace fridge, inverter & coffee machine. This has been a constant issue in this park for many years due to major flooding & bandaid fix in main electrical box. Not very well maintained since October when one maintenance guy left. Understaffed.

We really enjoyed our stay at Camden Holiday Park. The location was perfect—close to our family, the shopping centre, and even a lovely little fruit and veg grocer right across the road. The free splash park just a short distance away was an added bonus for our kids.

Our room was clean, comfortable, and had everything we needed for our young family.
Thank you for a wonderful stay!

We really enjoyed our stay at Camden Holiday Park. The location was perfect—close to our family, the shopping centre, and even a lovely little fruit and veg grocer right across the road. The free splash park just a short distance away was an added bonus for our kids.||Our room was clean, comfortable, and had everything we needed for our young family.|Thank you for a wonderful stay!
Basically a permanents trailer park a bit untidy but the few short term van spots were OK.|Close to shops and all amenities

ok but ammenities need upgrading I have never seen a upstairs ammenities area thats probably because theres a lot of older people use caravan parks & its unsafe for them I never received a receipt for payment & yes I checked the junk folder
No issues stay. Phone contact challenging. Good for workers.
Great Caravan Park great staff easy access to motorways
So impressed with the service. The young lady was extremely helpful. She couldn’t do enough. So nice to get decent service for a change
Had to cancel less than 24 hours after making booking due to son being injured. Nil refund.
A good little spot if you’re travelling through Wagga with a Caravan. Good access, friendly staff.
beautiful place ideal for family beautiful location arrived after hours everything all arranged

We unfortunately were unable to stay here due to an unexpected family situation this weekend however I would like to comment on the exceptional help my husband and I received from the staff.
Initially , I made an error with my booking but Rachael was totally understanding and helped me sort it out with ease.
I was then contacted promptly after a second email from the park. The staff should be commended on their professionalism and helpfulness and we really hope that in the future we do get to enjoy the park for a holiday. Thank you girls :)

The nicest cabins I’ve stayed in. Well appointed and maintained. Excellent service and communication from Rachael, The Manager. Quiet location with easy access to and from the M31 freeway. Here’s a company that cares about its asset and how it presents itself to the public. Highly recommended!

Awesome place to be... nice and friendly area.. BBQ area, washing room, and a community room to cook and relax.. the staff are incredible, and they look after you 100% and the grounds are kept perfect. Want a getaway or short/long term stay look no further then poplar tourist park at elderslie, thanks to all the staff that looked after me for 8months in a cabin, love and miss you guy's so much I'll be back to visit you guy's 100%.. you are all wonderful ❤️ 😊
Neat, clean and tidy, only drawback - it was a little close to the road

The park itself is very well planned and maintained. Amenities were clean, the grounds are pet friendly and the staff were lovely. Check in is mostly completed online, making it a breeze when you arrive. I was in and out in under one minute. Be wary when towing a low (tourer) caravan through the exit- it’s a bit of an angle and we scraped the van’s rear bumper (our fault for not checking it out prior to exiting). Local hoons can be a bit noisy but this isn’t something the park can control- take ear plugs if you have trouble with noise. I slept well but my husband was disturbed by the noise. All in all, I would recommend staying at Poplar.
Fantastic hosts. We have visited a few times and enjoyed every stay. the managers really care for their guests :-)

This is a gem of a park with clean amenities and a friendly and welcoming reception team|We had a great drive through site in the grassed area which was perfect for our quick stay|Has a great outlook over the adjacent paddocks and very easy to get in and out which is what you want for an overnighter

Just spent the long weekend, on a powered site in our tent. Safe to say we were freezing but absolutely no complaints about the park and it’s amenities. Toilet and shower block immaculately cleaned each time, my husband and I used them. All communications we had with the park staff were helpful and professional. Location for us was spot on. Very central to Camden and close to the netball courts that we went to daily for our daughter. Would definitely stay again if we needed to….but we would get in early and get a cabin as they looked really nice from outside.
Cheers

A very attractive park with lovely trees, and horses over the fence. Some food shops and beautiful parks within walking distance. Short drive to Camden. Not just a place to sleep, but a nice environment. Very well managed.
Nice place to stop
Good location & service. Staff are friendly and helpful. Public bus transport right out the front.

Great location for staying on the outskirts of Sydney. Historic Camden nearby. Wonderful spot when travelling with dogs as they have dog friendly cabins with fencing and a gate for security Also it is very close to a really good off-leash dog park , shops restaurants, everything you need.
Stayed here in our new caravan as close to the provider. Clean and tidy park and facilities. Caretaker/handyman went above and beyond helping up out on several occassions.
I recommend this caravan park, clean and tidy, friendly & helpful staff.

A very busy caravan park.  This is an okay place for a short stay. Nice outlook over paddocks.  Amenities were upstairs. However, quite a few bugs came in attracted to the lights.
Very friendly girls in reception. Close to shops in Camden.
Some powered sites would be tricky to reverse into.
Caravan Park with spacious sites, power, water and waste connect. $55/night for 2 persons.
The cabin was dirty. And there was mould in the shower.
Lovely staff very helpful nice clean cabin would stay again if I ever come back to oz

its a bit basic, but it was a nice place to stay, there was also some nice people in the caravan next to mine. so those were the positive stuff but now here is the negative stuff. so firstly the wifi didn't work so we couldnt use google or whatever. but i think that was only happening at the time i went. secondly, there is no fun stuff for kids to do. no pools, no fun stuff. just caravans and roads. also why do we have to walk up a lot of stairs to get to the toilet? it makes no sense at all!
Overall, i don't think you should go here. very boring and just bad.

Paid for 10 days on powered site a month before arrival, MH extensively damaged in Port Stephens Storms, i rang after the storm 2 weeks before our arrival date to cancel due to the damage i was asked to send proof photo's of the damage to the manager in which she rudely refused to refund us due to terms and conditions and 25% discount ?? Which we knew nothing about, no discount on receipt or in an email. I explained to the manager if we could make it down there to our friends 50th and stay at the poplar caravan park as per our booking we would definitely be there, she didn't care, all she kept saying due to our T & Cs there will be No refund, we have NEVER had such rude and poor customer service like what we received from the manager anywhere we have stayed.After several phone calls head office refunded us, Thank you head office for your understanding under these stressful circumstances.
We stay in our van in the grass area non powered site. Staff very friendly
Nice park apart from the caravan that we stayed buy radio on all night just taking turned down for 1hour then back on

Can’t recommend, dogs barking most of the night, hoons cutting up |Someone else parked on our site on arrival. Sorted quickly by office staff.|Too expensive for staying in a rooftop tent. Used no power, not offered a unpowered site. Showers in need of de-cobwebbing & hooks for clothing

Clean, quiet and comfortable. Perfect stay for my family as we visited people in the area. Great communication from staff to make an easy check in and out with no hiccups.|We housed a 2 bedroom cabin. Was perfect for 2 adults and 2 kids but may be a bit crowded for more. Still workable though with all necessary facilities :) |The bed was so comfortable!! Hard to get out of it in the morning as I wanted to stay haha |Thankyou for a great visit, we will definitely book again!
Grassed powered site. Comfortable good size, clean, tidy, friendly helpful staff, quiet, clean amenities. All round great experience, will definitely be back
So happy with the place an the people. Definitely going to stay again. Definitely recommend them.

Nestled in a quiet area of Camden you will find a friendly welcoming tourist park. First impressions of the room was airy and light. With comfy sofa and beds you will feel comfortable and rest assured everything is clean well maintained... Highly recommend 👍👍👍
A great place to live and to visit. The staff are very friendly and helpful.

This is a fantastic place to stay I was here for almost 6 months every single staff member is so Freindly and always ready to help the park manager Tori is very surportive always sends text messages with the weather etc one of the best parks I’ve stayed in highly recommended this park I’ll be back
We love Poplar Caravan Park. Excellent location and relaxing. ❤️

Friendly staff, has powered and unpowered site, normal facilities and dump point, dog friendly but on a very busy road so traffic noise 24/7.  Close to shops and plenty of places to eat and drink within walking distance

We booked in here for one night and glad we hadn’t booked any longer. Whilst the campsite itself self is fine, and would be fine for a self contained vehicle, the facilities are very dirty. We have stayed at many campsites along the east coast during our travels and never come across a toilet/shower block so bad. We understand that bugs exist everywhere, but there is no way these have been cleaned anytime recently for there to be so many dead bugs in the toilet cubicles, shower and around the sinks. I saw the cleaning tick sheet hadn’t been ticked since September (2 months ago) and believe this is probably correct.
Great caravan park
Great location, quiet and secure with friendly, helpful staff, clean amenities, lovely grounds.
Very friendly staff

It's an immaculate and tidy site. The staff go above & beyond, Taylor and Torri are amazing people and always helpful, and they are not far from shops and entertainment, 5 gold stars for this establishment would come back.

worst park i’ve ever visited kids wasn’t aloud on there bikes one man was outside videoing and taking pictures of my kids when we told staff they said that they didn’t care and did nothing about it also man kept coming over to my kids arguing swearing toilets are filthy and so is ground would not advise to come here STAY AWAY!!!
A very nice park, in lovely surroundings. Loved the fact that there was a good area in the shower cubicles to actually keep your clothes dry. I wish every camping ground would make sure of this!!

Amenities clean and accessible. Park grounds well cared for. Camp kitchen excellent. Friendly and helpful over the phone.
Cant comment on the rooms

A short visit for us: just one night while travelling. We were keen to find somewhere new that we could use while making regular long-distance visits to see family. Poplar proved a good location, not far from the Hume Highway, with good grass sites and facilities.
What a great little park. Away from the City but close enough to visit. Service was exceptional,   van sites very spacious,  Rest rooms clean and tidy. Highly recommend if your visiting Sydney

Lovely well run little business - family owned (I assume).
Great kitchen amenities, the elevated bathroom block actually retains some warmth during the night, and a great selection of both books and DVDs in the family room!
Really impressed with the place, and communication from easy-going staff re wind & weather warnings.
Staff were simply the BEST!! Lorikeet birds were everywhere, simply beautiful. Toilets were clean and tidy, enjoyed our stay for 3 nights

Sadly disappointed by our stay, based on a few things.
1. Amenities are in poor repair and not cleaned properly.
2. Hot water system is ill designed for a caravan park (4 x ~250L Heatpump Units) which while modern, are possibly the worst option for a caravan park (very poor recovery). All this means its a gamble if your going to have hot water.
3. Some campsites, like the one we had (nep 01) has flood lights beaming on it all night, not great if you have any canvas.
4. Grass campsites are poorly marked, or not at all.
5. Junk (jockey wheels) laying around near the Amenities for the duration (4 nights) of our stay creating a hazard for park users.
6. There is a fair bit of road noise, not really a park issue, but worthy to note.
7. Nep01 Campsite while large, i would avoid, any grey water pools under the van unless you have a very long sullage hose.

The good?
Location is convenient (though as mentioned, that's a double edged sword).
Staff were friendly
We only stayed one night, but the owners were very nice & helpful,thank you would stay there again

Owners  were lovely and very helpful.
First time my partner  and l stayed in our new caravan
Nice location for us as visiting family in area. Site ok but bit boggy if wet as depression to site . Met our needs. Toilets and showers ok

仕事で海外からオーストラリアホームステイに来る人たちを連れてくることを伝えてキャビンを予約していたのに、違うキャビンに入れられ、変更してくれなかった。
偽りに嘘を何重にも重ねて言い訳し、状況や他の人のせいにして誠実な謝罪がなかったことには失望した。
仕事で毎日Wi-Fiが必要なのに全く使えず。
5日も過ごすのに、ハンドウォッシュはなく、トイレットペーパーの追加もなし。
シャワーのドアはきちんと閉まらず、マットがずぶ濡れ。
昨年ステイした時と全く違う扱いで驚いたし大変残念に思った。

We have stayed here a few times as my Mum is in a nursing home in Campbelltown. I usually have a bit of trouble getting on to them as they are busy but it is a bit annoying. The location is great and the amenities are clean. It's a lovely park. It's close to the town of Camden. We walked to the shops

This is a nice little park and we were grateful to be squeezed in when they were full. The bathrooms were raised up a level and somewhat dated but clean and with good showers. It was a little pricey but there is easy access to central Sydney. Staff were pleasant and helpful. A good spot.
Nice and peaceful park, Great ammenities and friendly staff
Great place to stay,close to everything

Where do i start ..the park is beautiful ..the service is more than what you could ask for ..huge shout out to Lauren for her time her explanations and her patience .. now the rest ..there is a fantastic fruit veg directly across the road ..the main shopping center that is camden is about 2 mins drive 30mins walk ..you do have woolies BWS ..there is a coles and many other shops and business center ..its just this caravan park is miles away from Sydney cbd ..the airport and holsworthy army barracks ..the reason for this trip was to take my daughter back to holsworthy barracks ..anyhow i will give more sight as i have just arrived today... actually i think all these cabins are pretty much the same ..forgot to mention ...YES THEY ARE PET FRIENDLY ...

We had a wonderful stay at the poplar Tourist park. The cabin was great....clean and roomy. The park is set in a peaceful location. The staff go above and beyond. Taylah brought in a baby bed for our grandson to sleep in which was so helpful. The lady on the desk when checking out, helped give us directions to catch public transport to the airport. She printed it all out for us. So helpful!

Good location for us
Clean cabins
Great reception
Spent just one night there on our way back to Queensland. Friendly staff also we had 2 big dogs and a puppy. Not a problem for this caravan park. Very good.

I’ve been staying at Poplar Tourist Park for about 5 months on a work contract, the managers Nicole and Glen have been nothing short of kind, helpful, funny and accomodating to everything I need. The amenities are well maintained, my caravan spot is mowed and blowed off weekly, the park atmosphere is welcoming and friendly.

Thanks for having me here and I look forward to the rest of my stay!
Great place to stay while visiting the Blue Mountains & Sydney, this our 2nd visit, friendly staff, great drive through grass caravan site, clean bathrooms & quiet 🙂

Great park!
Only lot’s of mosquitos and flies in the girl amenities.

Lovely caravan park
We only stayed a night on the way through.
No playground for kids.

We had a stopover here on the way through. Friendly staff on the phone. Happy for an unpowered site and a shower. The unpowered sites are free rein, so space to leave can attached for a speedy getaway in the morning.  A stopover. Not a destination in our books.
Local park for our maiden voyage, amazing facilities considering location and recent flooding, credit to Nicole and Glen for hospitality and park vibe, an amazing little park 👏 10/10 ✨️
Great service very helpful staff and in a beautiful location

Used an unpowered camp site. Great place to stay. Quiet location but walking distance to the town...and a stones throw to Park Run (if that is your thing). Facilities and grounds are maintained to a good standard. Staff are friendly and will to help. Great value for money.
Absolutely loved it. Thanks to all the staff that made it a wonderful stay. We'll be back. Clean beautiful air conditioned rooms. It was awesome
Nice friendly & courteous staff. Handy location to local township. We only stayed 1 night but enjoyed our stay. Thank you
Great staff - personality, positivity and welcoming.

This was the best park I have stayed at ! The room was spotless and the staff were so friendly.

Special shout-out to Nicole and Glen for being so helpful, will definitely be back soon !
Fantastic staff and location just perfect will certainly be returning

A tidy park that was nice and quiet. Ammenities are out dated but served their purpose. Stairs to ammenities block not ideal for disabilities. Handy location to the western suburbs while surrounded by rural areas. Close to Camden town centre too. 5 min drive

Polite staff
Clean facilities
Quiet location

Not been to critical, shower taps leaked all night and need replacing. Air conditioner needs a clean. Otherwise great, I have stayed with you before and tell how much work you guys have put into the whole park in the last 12 months. Wow what a difference with presentation, so clean and tidy, gardens and lawns.
Most importantly the staff are amazing.
Rex

I camped here for 2 nights & I was so impressed with how clean it was as a caravan park! There just felt like there was care, which is really nice! Felt super safe camping & really loved the area- lots of paths to walk, so could get in a good morning & afternoon walk! I came prepared with all my food but great to note for next time that right across is a fruit barn + cafe= so food, brekky or coffee out options are right there! Will definitely be back, thank you so much :)

Garden view sites shown on website as in a tree area.  Site given was not anywhere near the trees or garden.  The picture of garden view sites showed long sites, long enough to keep caravan hitched to car. My site was only just long enough for caravan,  had to unhitch and hitch up again. Quite a lot of noise. Toilets were clean.

We stayed 2 nights in caravan powered site. Facilities were clean and tidy. Grounds maintained well. Our site didn’t have a grey water point. Apart from that, staff were friendly informed us well how to get to our site and the map was useful
Lovely service, clean amenities and great showers!

We stayed in a comfortable & clean cabin that was dog friendly so we could have our 2 girls with us also. Able to check in late using key box after a long day driving. Cabin had everything we needed. Would only suggest bedside tables for charging phones & table lamp. Fruit shop across the road was very handy, we bought a lasagna & heated it up in the cabin oven for dinner. Would stay again!
Really nice park,  very friendly staff, walking distance to shops and restaurants
Just good people to deal with, if you need help they will try to accommodate.
Stayed for one night at a powered site.  Very helpful staff, clean facilities (although a bit dated), convenient location
Showers and toilets were clean as was the park
We had a lovely pleasant stay in a cabin with our family. I would highly recommend the cabin and caravan park . It was close to shops and cafes.
Stayed in the van section. The whole area clean and tidy. The staff were exceptional.
Nice clean toilets and showers.

Clean welcoming friendly stay.
Definitely would come back.
Friendly very helpful people 🙂

We stayed here in September with our family of 4 + dog. We broke down on the way there, on a weekend where nothing was open. The staff at Poplar Tourist Park offered us support, advice, and assured us we'd have a place to stay if we needed to be there longer while sorting out repairs. We honestly can't fault our stay, thank you for having us and for taking care of us 😊

We stayed 1 night on a powered site with our van. Facilities close to site. Water, power and grey water discharge at each site was convenient. Staff very helpful with our late booking request. Would stay again.
Good location to most things

Mouldy and broken toilets/showers. Spotlights everywhere so bright it's hard to sleep. Told staff we were sleeping in tents so I expected we would be put on grass but instead we were assigned gravel and the spot was so tight we couldn't get the guy ropes out without blocking the footpaths. Plenty of room in the tent area so not sure why we had to setup in a caravan spot. Camp kitchen was a joke and the laundry did not have half the appliances working so we had to wait in line most of the day. I know this is real negative but there were so many issues I could never recommend it

Perfect stop over for a one night stay with the dogs. The cabin had everything that we needed!

We were travelling with a car and caravan and did not want to unhitch everything for a one night stay. We were able to park the car and van close by which made our lives much easier!

Happy to stay again! 😀

Well what a disappointment this place was,We were meant to be staying a week 4 days in and someone complained my sons dogs were aggressive as they bark occasionally when someone walks past our caravan sire. Omg what dog doesn't. Very aggressively asked us to pack up and leave. We left in total shock!!!!
One night caravan stay , friendly helpful staff , great showers , quiet 👍
Stayed for one night a at powered site very helpful and pleasant staff

Stayed just one night on my way from Brisbane to Adelaide. It was exactly what I needed: a private, quiet little cabin with icy aircon fans a comfy bed. Very clean, they accommodated my late arrival, easy to find. Only heard the occasional passing car from the road out front. Would definitely stay again.
Great park. Have stayed in our van previously but on last occasion, in 1 bed cabin. Good central location and quiet. Cabin was great, staff friendly and helpful, and price is reasonable.

Staff were super accommodating and friendly. Room was on point for all we needed and short walk to main town centre meant for easy entertainment and activity. Fruit market across the road has so much to offer including a great park for kids fun.
Good place to have a good rest, amenities, simply fantastic!

This was a great caravan park. Central location to everything we needed.
Staff very friendly and helpful. Ammenities are on the older side but fantastic all the same. Will definitely be back.

We always stay here, so central to where we are visiting.
Laundry and camp kitchen are good, new washing machines are terrific and plenty of line space.
The amenities are dated but clean and it was disappointing to see 1 shower and 1 sink dripping in the bathroom near the laundry
The sites are a good size and easy to negotiate
Staff are extremely friendly and welcoming
Will book again
We can’t thank your friendly workers who went way and beyond for us when we got there and then again this morning with our caravan issues we really are very thankful!!

Very convenient place to stay. Close to shops and easy access to main roads. Good base for sight seeing. Affordable powered van sites. Dump point. Clean facilities. Well maintained. Staff are friendly and engaging. Management keeps you informed via text messages, very thoughtful. Some drive through sites. Other sites easy to negotiate van parking. Online booking process is simple and easy to use. Pretty quiet at night too. We'd stay there again.
We spent a few days at this very pleasant and clean park. Showers hot with good pressure. Staff friendly. Great fruit and veg across the road.

We enjoyed staying here. Nicole was so helpful and flexible with us.
Feels like being in the country with the horses in the land next to us.
We felt safe, very quiet at night. Handy coffee and fruit shop across the road too.

Friendly and helpful staff to assist you with your booking. Outlooks onto farm land and close to Nepean river. Walk to local shops and short drive from major shopping centre.
Great place to stay overnight or holiday.

Great location and the staff are awesome. Clean and tidy it’s our go to home whenever we are in Sydney. Close to beautiful Camden with all facilities and Campbelltown as well for getting to Sydney. Definitely a great place to stay
Close to town & the water park for the kid's
Nicole and Macca were so accommodating, will definitely stay here whenever in Sydney again. Thanks guys!!
We just over night,  super friendly

I found ringing was so much easier then booking on the net and Maddie was so helpful. The cabin was neat and tidy bed and pillows were comfortable and hot water for shower was amazing. Would definitely recommend this caravan park 👌 👍
Sign in completed before arriving via text and the internet.   Lovely hostess.  Must be good as place is packed with caravans.  Our sites is ok.
Powered van site for 1 night. Good showers. All fine.

have stayed here a few times while caravaning always found staff friendly and helpful good sites but my only complaint there is not enough water pressure to have a comfortable shower in our van other than that see you next time

All that we require is at Poplar. We’ve been before this weekend and we are booked to go again, which, I think says it all. It’s not far from home for us but a convenient place to stay when we’re attending events near Camden. The staff are helpful, amenities are clean and Camden is a lovely town.
Very clean park and amenities. Welcomed by Maddy who was terrific will stay here again. Very friendly horse in paddock next door.
Well located when visiting Camden.
Ideal location, clean & tidy and welcoming.
What a ripper. Great caravan site, clean amenities. Dinner seafood basket that we could not finish. Don't miss this park.

We stayed here for the location, we had to attend a relative's funeral, the church in Camden, the burial in Leppington, the wake at Kearns. We turned up on a busy Friday afternoon & the friendly staff managed to find a powered site for our caravan
Service was great . Kept us in the loop with anything happening at the park, storms, wind etc. Enjoyed our stay, will come again.
We were lucky enough to get the last site on a busy Friday afternoon until Thursday, prices & location was excellent

The cabin we had was clean, tidy and had all the necessities we required for for our stay. Great location with a grocer across the road and a coffee van setup, supermarket and restaurants all within close range. Only gave a 4star as it was difficult getting through via phone to organize a late check in on arrival. Other then that it was a great stay.
Lovely little Park, clean and tidy. Friendly and helpful staff. Easy to walk to town. Definitely stay again

The site was a good size with everything easy to access. The park is well lit up and the staff are all very friendly and helpful. We were kept up to date with all that was happening within the park. Great coffee place across the road. Would definitely stay again
Very accommodating for our last minute visit and found us a nice drive through spot down the back.
Great cabin, clean and very comfortable. Great access to shops, bus stop at entrance.
Great place to stay with excellent facilities, this was booked for staff and they have already requested to stay again for their next stint.
Great park to stop we had a great time the staff were terrific only thing could be improved on is the dump point really needs a new top on it

We stay here anytime we come to Sydney and have always found it great. Friendly and helpful staff, plenty of campsites, close to big shops, awesome BMX bike track just up the road and close public transport are just some of the highlights of our stays. Good for families.

I have stayed there before  & there amenities are super clean also there grounds are well kept I would not hesitate in recommending anyone to stay there also their staff are very helpful  friendly Phil Perry

We actually stayed overnight at a unpowered site, as my husband needed to drop me at the domestic airport, so needed to drop off the van. I made the booking over the phone and was really happy with the friendliness of the staff. Upon arrival I was greeted with the same friendly smile and checking in was no issue. Plenty of area to chose from and very happy with the location 🤗

The caravan parking sites are adequate and power and taps are located appropriately. There is great night lighting around the park making it feel a safe place to be . I saw a police patrol car doing its round late/early at night/morning adding to a sense of safety.
The ammenities block was up stairs which is a bit of putting, especially when having to do a mid night pit stop , but motion sensor lighting ensured a sure footed climb. These facilities could do with an update as they are a little old fashioned and worn .
Great caravan park. Caravan spaces are good sizes and easy to get in and out of. Everyone was super friendly. Location is quiet but also close to lots of shops and other things.

Poplar Tourist Park is very convenient for those that what to explore Sydney but still wants a quiet place to rest. Managers and Staff are very friendly and helpful. I will be back for sure. Margarete

Good spot . Staff very helpful & friendly .
Will certainly be back again

We had a Camplify van delivered and our caravan site was nice and central to all amenities. We really enjoyed our stay and the staff and our other camper neighbours were awesome! If I had to pick at anything it would be that on a few occasions my shower at night was cold. We would definitely stay here again though! Thanks team!
The air con did not heat up the room and we all froze all night
The park is in a very good location I originally was only staying one night but they very kindly let me stay in my original spot another two nights instead of having to move .

Great tidy little rooms we stayed in the Workmen's accommodation. Had everything we needed  was more than enough to come back relax and sleep. Fullnsize fridge which was really good, fullsize shower in the ensuite and wifi. Very clean highly recommend affordable.

Thanks guys 5 stars

My husband had recently had an operation so we asked for some special assistance which was readily made available.
Lovely helpful hosts.

Great little cabins. Good price (Workmen's accommodation). Basic but very comfortable,   Great little unit with air-conditioning ,TV, wifi full sized fridge etc  If you're coming and going just sleep and relax after a busy day they are perfect. The units have everything you need again wifi, air conditioning, little kitchen ete and small ensuite, and they were kept really well clean and tidy. When we arrived 5 stars thanks guys
Great new cabin. Very clean quite spot
A great place to stay great service friendly people,but still happy to go home 4 sunny weather 🖐
The park is well maintained staff and management very friendly .. grounds are kept In beautiful condition overall great
Way overpriced for the standard of facility provided. Units and park poorly maintained. Staying overnight was not an enjoyable experience.

We stay here whenever we come to Sydney.  The cabins are clean  and well outfitted and we are able to have a dog friendly cabin as we always travel with our small dog.  Staff are friendly and helpful and beds are very comfortable which is important as you age.  Thoroughly recommend

Great position
Friendly staff
Quiet and pleasant
Little bit of road noise on the weekends but otherwise quiet.
Would stay again
Great caravan park. Clean, tidy. Lovely friendly staff.
Very helpful, great spot

Great park in a quiet location. Friendly, professional and very helpful staff. Grounds and facilities very clean. We had some issues with our caravan and the staff were very knowledgable about who could help us. Great fruit and veggie shed across the road and highly recommend the 2 Eggs Cafe that is located outside the shed.
Good  location some facilities not working during our visit

Usually pretty good. Hired a powered site, ended up on a grassed area down near river but had to double up with another user for power and water. Close to great cafe, two good eggs, and take away plus great fruit market. Close to Narellen shops.
Girls were amazingly helpful ,will certainly be going back .
